select 1 as rtn;

source.query:
SELECT bidid
	   FROM ( SELECT a.bidid,
                CASE
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '11'::text THEN '서울특별시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '41'::text THEN '경기도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '28'::text THEN '인천광역시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '42'::text THEN '강원특별자치도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '44'::text THEN '충청남도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '30'::text THEN '대전광역시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '35'::text THEN '세종특별자치시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '43'::text THEN '충청북도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '26'::text THEN '부산광역시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '31'::text THEN '울산광역시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '27'::text THEN '대구광역시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '47'::text THEN '경상북도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '48'::text THEN '경상남도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '46'::text THEN '전라남도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '29'::text THEN '광주광역시'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '45'::text THEN '전라북도'::text
                    WHEN substr(b."상위 코드", 1, 2) = '50'::text THEN '제주특별자치도'::text
                    ELSE NULL::text
                END AS new_sido
           FROM cd_ods.tb_sf_eat_bid_master a
              JOIN ( SELECT *
                   FROM cd_ods.tb_mdm_school_info
                  WHERE 1 = 1 AND (tb_mdm_school_info."담당 기관 사업자번호" IN ( SELECT tb_mdm_school_info_1."담당 기관 사업자번호"
                           FROM cd_ods.tb_mdm_school_info tb_mdm_school_info_1
                          GROUP BY tb_mdm_school_info_1."담당 기관 사업자번호"
                         HAVING count(*) = 1))) b ON a.org_biz_id::text = b."담당 기관 사업자번호"
          WHERE 1=1
          and a.postdate between '2026-02-01' and '2026-02-28'
          ) unnamed_subquery
 	 WHERE new_sido <> ALL (ARRAY['서울특별시'::text, '경기도'::text, '인천광역시'::text, ''::text])

query.value:
insert into cd_ods.tb_sf_eat_order_detail_extracted
select * from cd_ods.tb_sf_eat_order_detail q 
where bidid = '@{item().bidid}'
AND NOT EXISTS (  
      SELECT 1  
      FROM cd_ods.tb_sf_eat_order_detail_keyword_except ke  
      WHERE (
      	  q.name = ke.keyword 
      	 	or q.spec = ke.keyword
         )  
      )
and name IS NOT NULL
AND name ~ '[a-zA-Z가-힣]'
;

select 1 as success

properties.description: PG데이터 lake에 이동 및 테이블 데이터 삭제

query.value:
select select_query, 
case when delete_strategy = 'delete' then delete_query||'; select 1 as success'
     else drop_query||'; select 1 as success' 
     end as delete_strategy,
policy_id, lake_container, lake_path_template, schema_name,table_name,  date_column_name, table_storage_type, file_format, retention_value, retention_unit
from (
select format(
    'select * from %I.%I where %I <= %s',
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    date_column_name,
    case
        when date_column_type = 'timestamp'
        then
            format(
                'now() - interval ''1 %s'' * %s ',
                retention_unit,
               case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end
            )
        when date_column_type = 'yyyy-mm-dd'
        then 
        	format(
        		'to_char(current_date - interval ''%s %s'', ''yyyy-mm-dd'')',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
        	)
        when date_column_type = 'yymm'
        then 
        	format(
        		'to_char(current_date - interval ''%s %s'', ''yymm'')',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
        	)
         when date_column_type = 'yyyymmdd'
        then 
        	format(
        		'to_char(current_date - interval ''%s %s'', ''yyyymmdd'')',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
        	)
        else
            format(
                'current_date - interval ''%s %s''',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
            )
    end
) as select_query,
format(
    'delete from %I.%I where %I <= %s',
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    date_column_name,
    case
        when date_column_type = 'timestamp'
        then
            format(
                'now() - interval ''1 %s'' * %s',
                retention_unit,
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end
            )
        when date_column_type = 'yyyy-mm-dd'
        then 
        	format(
        		'to_char(current_date - interval ''%s %s'', ''yyyy-mm-dd'')',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
        	)
        	 when date_column_type = 'yymm'
        then 
        	format(
        		'to_char(current_date - interval ''%s %s'', ''yymm'')',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
        	)
        	when date_column_type = 'yyyymmdd'
        then 
        	format(
        		'to_char(current_date - interval ''%s %s'', ''yyyymmdd'')',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
        	)
        else
            format(
                'current_date - interval ''%s %s''',
                 case when retention_value = 0 then 0 
               else retention_value + 1 end,
                retention_unit
            )
    end
) as delete_query,
format(
    'drop table %I.%I_%s',
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    (select  to_char(now() - interval '1 month' * (retention_value +1),'YYMM')
    )       
) as drop_query,
policy_id, lake_container, lake_path_template, schema_name,table_name,  date_column_name, table_storage_type, delete_strategy,file_format , retention_value, retention_unit
from cd_meta.table_retention_policy
where 1=1
and is_active = true
)

update cd_meta.table_retention_policy set last_upd_dt = now() , is_active  = (case when '@{item().retention_value}' = '0' and '@{item().retention_unit}' = 'month' then false  else true  end) where policy_id = @{item().policy_id};

select 1 as success

@concat('select CD_IF.FUNC_CDI_LOG(''U'' , p_seq => ''', activity('Input log 8_copy1').output.firstRow.RESULT, ''', p_result => ''E'', p_error_msg => ''', replace(activity('PIP_API_CUSTOMER_OPINION_YOUTUBE_PG').Error.Message, '''','‘'),''') as result from dual')
